title: pinus selenolepis
intro: Pinus selenolepis, also known as the Chinese pine, is a species of evergreen coniferous tree in the pine family, Pinaceae. The bark and needles of the Chinese pine have been used in traditional Chinese medicine for their medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Pinus selenolepis include reducing inflammation and improving respiratory health, as well as acting as an antiviral and antibacterial agent. Herbal preparations of Pinus selenolepis include infusions and decoctions of the needles and bark, which can be used to treat a variety of ailments, including coughs and colds.
